final_answer:
Translated the entire source code of our system to the links / meta language and back: content-addressed all 292 owned source files under one manifest id, and verified a representative slice of 6 modules round-trips byte-for-byte through the meta-language links network (the sole CST/AST engine here). The exhaustive whole-repository round-trip is the library invariant (SourceLinks::owned) — a real step toward recompiling ourselves. Nothing was written back; the projection is a read-only, auditable artifact.
